Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC000 "MISSILECOMMAND-C000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Missile Command.prg"
Metadata.Notes: This is a BASIC game which loads two BASIC programs (one at $0801 is used to load the files from the tape and the actual game program is loaded at $0A01). Therefore an init routine has been added at $C000 to setup the necessary BASIC pointers and execute the RUN command to start the game program. Note: the breakpoint to use for dumping is $86AD
